name: AccelByte
description: AccelByte — Managed backend platform for games: matchmaking, leaderboards, entitlements, and analytics on cloud or on-premise.

seo.title: AccelByte — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: AccelByte: AccelByte — Managed backend platform for games: matchmaking, leaderboards, entitlements, and analytics on cloud or on-premise.

when_to_use: Adding matchmaking and leaderboards to a multiplayer game
Deploying game backend on-prem behind a studio's firewall
Handling entitlements and DLC purchases at scale
Running real-time game analytics for 1M+ daily players
Managed game backend so teams skip DevOps overhead

pros: Matchmaking and entitlements out of the box
review.verdict: A serious AAA backend choice with enterprise scale, not a weekend prototype toolkit.
review.best_for: AAA and mid-size studios shipping live-service multiplayer games
review.not_for: Solo indie devs or hobby projects on tight budgets

lock_in.reason: Proprietary game backend tightly coupled with services

developer_experience.reason: Unreal/Unity SDKs, services-oriented docs, complex onboarding
